description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with vertical paneling and a weathered, industrial appearance. The exterior is predominantly white, with visible rust stains running down the sides, suggesting prolonged exposure to the elements. The top of the barrel features a green, hazardous material symbol and green liquid drips, indicating the presence of toxic or dangerous contents. Bold black stenciled text on the side reads 'CAUTION TOXIC MATERIAL INSIDE,' further emphasizing its hazardous nature. The surface finish is matte with some areas of discoloration and grime, and there are no visible handles or reinforcement bands. This barrel is typically found in industrial or urban outdoor settings where hazardous waste is stored.
description: A large, weathered white metal barrel with rust stains, green hazardous markings, and bold warning text indicating toxic material inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the warning text 'CAUTION TOXIC MATERIAL INSIDE' and prominent rust stains.
description_view_1: Side view with partial text visible, green drips on the rim, and more rust streaks.
description_view_2: Rear side with minimal text, mostly showing the white surface, rust, and green markings on the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side with the word 'TOXIC' visible, heavy rust streaks, and green drips along the rim.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: CAUTION TOXIC MATERIAL INSIDE, green hazardous symbol, rust stains
